cards.title: crosstalk
cards.content:
![](../media/img/language-learning-methods/crs.webp)

- two language partners speak in their respective native languages
- so it's about listening comprehension; and you avoid the awkward halting convo when you can't actually speak in the target lang yet

cards.title: walking audio method
cards.content:
1. pick hq-audio material in your target lang (can be designed for learners)
2. walk around outside, listen to it
3. repeat sentences or bits quietly that you speak
4. if after a while, you hear phrases/words stick out/being repeated, memorize them and repeat them into google translate

— [How to LEARN ANY LANGUAGE on Your Own (Fast!)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qYsHLUAlH_8)

cards.title: laddering
cards.content: learning a target language using another target language as "native" language
